data.title: 国际服主线Vol.2 第二章动画PV1公开

data.body:
[Main Story Special Movie Clip #1]

The special movie clip (part 1) for 'Clockwork Flower Pavane, Chapter 2: The Romance of Friendship, Courage, and Light' has been released!

#BlueArchive
